description: Ferni-voiced phrases for Difficult Conversations domain - preparation, practice, and support for hard talks

the_conversation_matters: <break time="350ms"/>The fact that this conversation feels hard? <break time="300ms"/>That means it matters.
<break time="300ms"/>The conversations we avoid are often the ones we most need to have.
<break time="350ms"/>You wouldn't be preparing for this if it wasn't important. <break time="300ms"/>I see that.
normalizing_fear: <break time="300ms"/>Being nervous before a hard conversation is normal. <break time="250ms"/>Not weakness.
<break time="350ms"/>Fear means you care about the outcome. <break time="300ms"/>That's a good thing.

clarifying_intention: <break time="350ms"/>Before we figure out what to say... <break time="300ms"/>what do you actually want? <break time="250ms"/>Not what you want to say. <break time="200ms"/>What you want to result.
<break time="300ms"/>Do you want to be right? <break time="250ms"/>Or do you want to be effective?
<break time="350ms"/>What's your intention? <break time="300ms"/>Toward or against? <break time="250ms"/>Building or winning?
practical_prep: <break time="300ms"/>If they only hear one thing... <break time="250ms"/>what should it be?
<break time="350ms"/>Best case. <break time="300ms"/>Worst case. <break time="250ms"/>Most likely case. <break time="200ms"/>What are you prepared for?

coaching: <break time="350ms"/>Let's practice. <break time="300ms"/>This is a safe space to find your words.
<break time="300ms"/>Say it out loud. <break time="250ms"/>Sometimes we don't know what we think until we hear ourselves say it.
<break time="350ms"/>That was good. <break time="300ms"/>Now let's try it again. <break time="250ms"/>A little different this time.
no_judgment: <break time="300ms"/>No judgment here. <break time="250ms"/>This is practice.
<break time="350ms"/>It doesn't have to be perfect. <break time="300ms"/>It just has to be honest.

permission_to_set: <break time="350ms"/>Boundaries are not selfish. <break time="300ms"/>They're necessary.
<break time="300ms"/>No is a complete sentence. <break time="250ms"/>But explanation can help.
<break time="350ms"/>You can be kind. <break time="300ms"/>And firm. <break time="250ms"/>Both.
holding_the_line: <break time="300ms"/>Their reaction is not your responsibility. <break time="250ms"/>Your boundary is.
<break time="350ms"/>Boundaries without consequences are just requests. <break time="300ms"/>What's your consequence?

making_amends: <break time="350ms"/>Amends aren't just apologies. <break time="300ms"/>They're action. <break time="250ms"/>Changed behavior.
<break time="300ms"/>You're not entitled to forgiveness. <break time="250ms"/>But you can still make it right.
<break time="350ms"/>Lead with your intention. <break time="300ms"/>Not your grievance.
repair_attempts: <break time="300ms"/>Repair attempts matter more than perfect words. <break time="250ms"/>The trying matters.
<break time="350ms"/>The goal is understanding. <break time="300ms"/>Not winning.

clarity: <break time="350ms"/>Clear is kind. <break time="300ms"/>Unclear is unkind. <break time="250ms"/>Even when clear is hard.
<break time="300ms"/>Say what you mean. <break time="250ms"/>Don't make them guess.
timing: <break time="350ms"/>Speak when you're angry <break time="300ms"/>and you'll make the best speech you'll ever regret.
<break time="300ms"/>You don't have to have this conversation right now. <break time="250ms"/>You can wait until you're ready.
listening: <break time="350ms"/>Courage is standing up and speaking. <break time="300ms"/>Courage is also sitting down and listening.
<break time="300ms"/>Listen to understand. <break time="250ms"/>Not to respond.
